    <p><inlineCode parentName="p">{`AepInbox`}</inlineCode>{` is a Jetpack Compose composable that renders an Inbox UI based on the provided `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "./inboxuistate.md"

fun AepInbox(
    uiState: InboxUIState,
    inboxStyle: InboxUIStyle = InboxUIStyle.Builder().build(),
    itemsStyle: AepUIStyle = AepUIStyle(),
    observer: AepInboxEventObserver
)
`}</code></pre>

    <h2 {...{
      "id": "behavior"
    }}>{`Behavior`}</h2>
    <p>{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`AepInbox`}</inlineCode>{` composable automatically:`}</p>
    <ol>
      <li parentName="ol"><strong parentName="li">{`Handles State Changes`}</strong>{`: Responds to changes in `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`InboxUIState`}</inlineCode>{` and renders the appropriate UI`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol"><strong parentName="li">{`Supports Layouts`}</strong>{`: Renders inbox in vertical or horizontal layouts based on `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`InboxTemplate.layout`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ol"><strong parentName="li">{`Manages Empty States`}</strong>{`: Displays custom empty message and image when no content cards are available`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol"><strong parentName="li">{`Applies Unread Styling`}</strong>{`: Automatically applies unread background colors to unread content cards based on theme (light/dark) and configuration`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol"><strong parentName="li">{`Wraps in Material Theme`}</strong>{`: Provides Material Theme context for proper rendering of text and other Material components`}</li>
    </ol>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "example-usage"
    }}>{`Example Usage`}</h2>
    <InlineAlert variant="warning" slots="header, text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`Do not embed AepInbox inside an unbounded container/lazy layout that scrolls in the same direction`}</p>
    <p><inlineCode parentName="p">{`AepInbox`}</inlineCode>{` uses a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`LazyColumn`}</inlineCode>{` for vertical layouts and a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`LazyRow`}</inlineCode>{` for horizontal layouts. The orientation is set when the inbox campaign is authored and published on Adobe Journey Optimizer UI. Embedding `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`AepInbox`}</inlineCode>{` inside an unbounded container/lazy layout that scrolls in the same direction — such as a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`LazyColumn`}</inlineCode>{` for a vertical scrolling inbox or a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`LazyRow`}</inlineCode>{` for a horizontal scrolling inbox — causes a runtime crash (`}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`IllegalStateException: Vertically/Horizontally scrollable component was measured with an infinity maximum constraints`}</inlineCode>{`).`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "basic-usage"
    }}>{`Basic Usage`}</h3>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Kotlin" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "kotlin-1"
    }}>{`Kotlin`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-kotlin"
      }}>{`@Composable
fun InboxScreen(viewModel: InboxViewModel = viewModel()) {
    val inboxUIState by viewModel.inboxUIState.collectAsState()
    
    MaterialTheme {
        AepInbox(
            uiState = inboxUIState,
            observer = viewModel.observer
        )
    }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "with-custom-styling"
    }}>{`With Custom Styling`}</h3>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Kotlin" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "kotlin-2"
    }}>{`Kotlin`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-kotlin"
      }}>{`@Composable
fun CustomInboxScreen(viewModel: InboxViewModel = viewModel()) {
    val inboxUIState by viewModel.inboxUIState.collectAsState()
    
    val inboxStyle = remember {
        InboxUIStyle.Builder()
            .headingStyle(AepTextStyle(
                textStyle = TextStyle(
                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
                    fontSize = 24.sp
                )
            ))
            .unreadBgColor(AepColor(
                light = Color(0xFFE3F2FD),
                dark = Color(0xFF1E3A5F)
            ))
            .build()
    }
    
    val cardStyle = remember {
        AepUIStyle(
            smallImageUIStyle = SmallImageUIStyle.Builder()
                .cardStyle(AepCardStyle(
                    elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(
                        defaultElevation = 4.dp
                    )
                ))
                .build()
        )
    }
    
    MaterialTheme {
        AepInbox(
            uiState = inboxUIState,
            inboxStyle = inboxStyle,
            itemsStyle = cardStyle,
            observer = viewModel.observer
        )
    }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "with-content-card-event-listener"
    }}>{`With Content Card Event Listener`}</h3>
    <p>{`To listen to content card events (display, interact, dismiss), implement `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../content-card-ui/Android/public-classes/contentcarduieventlistener.md"
      }}>{`ContentCardUIEventListener`}</a>{` and pass it to the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`InboxEventObserver`}</inlineCode>{` in your ViewModel:`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Kotlin" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "kotlin-3"
    }}>{`Kotlin`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-kotlin"
      }}>{`import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
import androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope
import com.adobe.marketing.mobile.aepcomposeui.AepUI
import com.adobe.marketing.mobile.messaging.ContentCardEventObserver
import com.adobe.marketing.mobile.messaging.ContentCardUIEventListener
import com.adobe.marketing.mobile.messaging.InboxEventObserver
import com.adobe.marketing.mobile.messaging.MessagingInboxProvider
import com.adobe.marketing.mobile.messaging.Surface
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.SharingStarted
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.stateIn

// In ViewModel - observer survives configuration changes
class InboxViewModel : ViewModel() {
    private val cardEventListener = object : ContentCardUIEventListener {
        override fun onDisplay(aepUI: AepUI<*, *>) {
            // Called when a content card is displayed
        }
        
        override fun onInteract(
            aepUI: AepUI<*, *>,
            interactionId: String?,
            actionUrl: String?
        ): Boolean {
            // Called when user taps on a card or button
            // Handle custom deep links
            actionUrl?.let { url ->
                handleDeepLink(url)
                return true // Return true to indicate URL was handled
            }
            
            // Return false to let SDK handle the URL (open in browser)
            return false
        }
        
        override fun onDismiss(aepUI: AepUI<*, *>) {
            // Called when user dismisses a card
        }
    }
    
    val inboxProvider = MessagingInboxProvider(Surface("inbox"))
    
    val observer = InboxEventObserver(
        inboxProvider,
        ContentCardEventObserver(cardEventListener)
    )

    val inboxUIState = inboxProvider.getInboxUI()
        .stateIn(
            scope = viewModelScope,
            started = SharingStarted.WhileSubscribed(5000),
            initialValue = InboxUIState.Loading
        )
}

@Composable
fun InboxWithEventsScreen(viewModel: InboxViewModel = viewModel()) {
    val inboxUIState by viewModel.inboxUIState.collectAsState()
    
    MaterialTheme {
        AepInbox(
            uiState = inboxUIState,
            observer = viewModel.observer
        )
    }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`For detailed information on the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ContentCardUIEventListener`}</inlineCode>{` callbacks, see `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../content-card-ui/Android/public-classes/contentcarduieventlistener.md"
      }}>{`ContentCardUIEventListener`}</a>{`.`}</p>

    </MDXLayout>;
}
;
